_doc: Closed taxonomy for the Casebook Battle System. Single source of truth for tags. Adding a tag requires a Code artifact and an update to scripts/systems/battle/effectiveness.gd's tag set assertions. Removing a tag is a save-migration concern. Chapter 1 working set only — Ch2+ tags are added when the first Ch2 encounter that consumes them lands. See critique 2026-05-19-design.md §F10 for the discipline rationale.

article_tags._doc: Convention articles consumed by Chapter 1. Namespace: 'echr_<n>' or 'pl_const_<n>'. Ch2+ articles are added with the encounter that first references them.
article_tags.pl_const_45: Right to a fair and public hearing

principle_tags._doc: Doctrinal principles consumed by Chapter 1. Same principle can attach to multiple Articles. Adding a principle requires a real referent in the chapter being authored.
principle_tags.proportionality: Whether the interference is proportionate to the legitimate aim
principle_tags.individual_assessment: Requirement to assess the individual case on its facts
principle_tags.procedural_fairness: Adequate procedural safeguards in the decision-making process
principle_tags.access_to_court: Practical and effective access to a tribunal (Golder line)
principle_tags.effective_remedy: A remedy must exist in fact, not only on paper
principle_tags.legal_certainty: Law must be foreseeable and accessible
principle_tags.margin_of_appreciation: Domestic authorities have latitude within limits
principle_tags.prescribed_by_law: Interference must have a basis in domestic law
principle_tags.legitimate_aim: Interference must serve one of the listed aims
principle_tags.service_of_process: Notice and proper service (doręczenie zastępcze and analogues)

context_tags._doc: Factual context consumed by Chapter 1. The same Principle in a different Context lands differently. Ch2+ contexts are added with the encounter that first references them.
context_tags.fair_trial: Court proceedings; hearing rights; presumption of innocence
context_tags.service_failure: Defective notice, missed delivery, postal theatre
context_tags.documentary: Evidence is paper-bound; missing or mishandled documents
context_tags.deadline: Time-limit pressure; calendars, KPC time periods

effectiveness_buckets._doc: Five narrative buckets. Resolver in scripts/systems/battle/effectiveness.gd maps a numeric score to one of these.
